title: Crispy Garlic Australian Onion Stir-fry
description: A festive vegetarian-friendly dish featuring crispy onions braised with garlic for a savory and crisp texture.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chopped garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant, making sure to stir frequently to prevent burning.
Increase heat to high, then add the chopped onions. Stir-fry continuously for about 8-10 minutes until the onions are translucent and golden brown.
Season with a pinch of salt and pepper to taste.
Remove from heat immediately after seasoning for best crispness.
